pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines and creates the ODT document at this path.
setup_task.sh creates the style guide at this path.
setup_task.sh injects this exact title into the ODT document.
setup_task.sh injects this text as part of the warning paragraph in the ODT document.

metadata_value: Must be certified in the Mycophenolate REMS.
Must counsel patients on the risk of embryo-fetal toxicity.
Must enroll female patients of reproductive potential.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated REMS document created by setup scripts. Verified all formatting targets explicitly match the instructions and text generated in setup_task.sh, including the title, black box warning phrase, h1 and h2 sections, bullet list items for healthcare providers, and the specific timetable column headers.
